user.title: Flash Invader Account
user.description: Enter your Flash Invader UID. You can find this in the app settings or by capturing network traffic from the Flash Invader app.

cities.title: Select Cities
cities.description: Choose which cities to track. You can change this later in integration options.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your Flash Invader UID is no longer valid. Please enter a new UID.

error.invalid_uid: Invalid UID. Please check and try again.
error.invalid_uid_format: UID must be in UUID format (e.g., XXXXXXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXXXXXXXXXX).
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Flash Invader servers. Check your internet connection.
error.cannot_connect_spotter: Cannot connect to invader-spotter.art. The site may be down.
error.no_cities_selected: Please select at least one city to track.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Flash Invader account is already configured.

init.title: Invader Tracker Options
init.description: Configure which cities to track and update frequencies.

error.no_cities_selected: Please select at least one city to track.
